div.div:
For new invoice
customer Should be taken from liability;
billing group, contract
should be taken from liability's connected invoice
receipt of an invoice, communication data for billing
should be taken from the current version of the contract
templates, issuer, number of income account, basis for issuing, cost center
should be taken from "taxes for the grid operator" nomenclature
Document type should be invoice
Status should be real, immediately create real invoice without draft
Tax even date should be current day
Payment date should be tax event date
invoice type - reconnection
invoice prefix - prefix for service/goods invoice
meter reading from, meter reading to should be empty
applicable interest rate should be empty
direct debit should be added from billing group or from contract or from customer (billing group and customer from latest liability, contract from latest liability's connected invoice)
Vat rate should be default vat rate
amount excluding vat should be taken from "grid operator taxes" nomenclature's tax for reconnection field
Value of vat should be equal (amount excluding vat*Vat rate)
In summery data tab should have only 1 row and in this row should be filled following 3 field:
price component or price component group or item
value should be taken from "taxes for grid operator" nomenclature
Value
value should be taken from "taxes for grid operator" nomenclature's tax for reconnection field
Unit of measure for value
value should be taken from "taxes for grid operator" nomenclature's currency field

div.div:
For new invoice
customer Should be taken from liability;
billing group, contract
should be taken from liability's connected invoice
receipt of an invoice, communication data for billing
should be taken from the current version of the contract
templates, issuer, number of income account, basis for issuing, cost center
should be taken from "taxes for the grid operator" nomenclature
Document type should be invoice
Status should be real, immediately create real invoice without draft
Tax even date should be current day
Payment date should be tax event date
invoice type - reconnection
invoice prefix - prefix for service/goods invoice
meter reading from, meter reading to should be empty
applicable interest rate should be empty
direct debit should be added from billing group or from contract or from customer (billing group and customer from latest liability, contract from latest liability's connected invoice)
Vat rate should be default vat rate
amount excluding vat should be taken from "grid operator taxes" nomenclature's tax for reconnection field
Value of vat should be equal (amount excluding vat*Vat rate)
In summery data tab should have only 1 row and in this row should be filled following 3 field:
price component or price component group or item
value should be taken from "taxes for grid operator" nomenclature
Value
value should be taken from "taxes for grid operator" nomenclature's tax for reconnection field
Unit of measure for value
value should be taken from "taxes for grid operator" nomenclature's currency field
